Title: SignalRGB — Lively Pause Tester
Desc: Diagnostic wallpaper. Shows whether Lively's pause mechanism reaches this page — via the official livelyWallpaperPlaybackChanged JS hook, the document visibilitychange event, AND a requestAnimationFrame tick-rate probe. Big screen-wide text turns red 'PAUSED' or green 'PLAYING' so you can see at a glance, plus a running counter for each detection path. Use this to verify your Lively build actually pauses Web wallpapers before reporting an issue against the SignalRGB Glow Wallpaper.
Author: Delido
